title: lita breviflora
intro: Lita breviflora, also known as Lita breviflora or Lita, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is a flowering plant that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion. Lita breviflora is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
